text.message: Did you name yourself progamer because you were already a pro at catan before you made your colonist account?

It started from my chess account
So you were a pro at chess but you named yourself progamer for catan before even playing it?! :O

dont play rep then dude just chill

just curious do u do yt or whatver

All I know if you have high exp
ur stats from last season are great
so u are def the guy blue is thinking lol
